For example, we coded a focus writer mode.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Other features","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h3"},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Refactored files into workspaces and quickboards","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Added support for portable boards with embedded files like pictures","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":2},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Tools palette","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":3},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Workspace home screen, start screen.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":4}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"list","version":1,"listType":"bullet","start":1,"tag":"ul"}],"direction":"ltr","format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
nodes.plain:
Features added
We coded the architecture to support modular plugins where each module supports a file extension. For example, we coded a focus writer mode.
Other features
Refactored files into workspaces and quickboards
Added support for portable boards with embedded files like pictures
Tools palette
Workspace home screen, start screen.
